prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW/Audi 2.0L TSI EA888 Gen 3 (CCTA/CBFA) with a Garrett GT2867R turbo upgrade (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 56 trim compressor wheel), paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 4655DBB** external wastegate for precise boost control (targeting 28-30 psi on E85). The stock internals are reinforced with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83mm, 9.5:1 CR)** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** to handle the increased power (450-500 WHP goal).

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ clutch kit** with a **South Bend twin-disc clutch (organic/metallic hybrid friction material)** and **034 Motorsport lightweight flywheel** to manage the torque spike from the upgraded turbo setup. The transmission is reinforced with a **DieselGeek Sigma 6 short shifter** and **034 Motorsport transmission mounts** to reduce drivetrain slop under hard launches.

Custom **ECU tune via COBB Accessport (AP3-VW-004)** with a **custom E85 flex-fuel map** developed by **EuroCompulsion**, featuring **individual cylinder trims, aggressive ignition timing (up to 22° BTDC), and a 3-port boost solenoid upgrade (Mac Valves 35A)** for faster spool and reduced lag. The fuel system is upgraded with **DeatschWerks 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump**, **Siemens Deka 60 lb/hr injectors (flow-matched by Injector Dynamics)**, and a **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator** for consistent E85 delivery.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning Eos-specific widebody kit (Type 1, 30mm flares front/rear)** with **custom carbon fiber fender vents** to clear the **ETS 5-tire setup (245/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear on OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels)**. The kit includes a **custom front splitter (3D-printed ABS with aluminum reinforcement)** and a **Rieger Tuning GT-style rear diffuser** with integrated **AWE Touring Edition exhaust tips (dual 90mm outlets)** for a subtle yet aggressive stance.

**OEM+ Euro-spec headlight conversion (VW 5N0 941 007 G, LED DRLs)** with **Morimoto XB LED bulbs (5500K, 3000 lumens)** and **custom smoked LED taillights (VW 5N0 945 095 A, modified with red/clear housing)**. The roof is replaced with a **custom carbon fiber hardtop (hand-laid by Seibon Carbon)** to reduce weight and improve rigidity, while the **B-pillars are wrapped in 3M Matte Black Satin vinyl** for a stealth OEM+ look.

**Interior overhaul with Recaro SR-7 (Eos-specific mounts, Alcantara/leather upholstery)** and a **custom roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded by Autopower Industries, bolt-in design)** painted **VW Tornado Red (LK9B)**. The dashboard is replaced with a **Mk6 Golf R flat-bottom steering wheel (VW 5K0 419 091 C)** and a **custom gauge pod (AEM X-Series 30-0300 wideband AFR, boost, and oil pressure gauges)** mounted in the center console. The stock seats are reupholstered in **Nappa leather with red stitching (by Katzkin)** and feature **Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses** for track use.
